parameters: \n<Elovia>Ah, man.\.\. I think this one's busted.
I always dread coming in to work here nowadays.
I swear, walking these halls... you never feel like you're alone.
I was making my rounds last night, when I heard what sounded like two people talking around a corner.
I go and investigate and what do I see?
Nothing. Except one of those damned terminals, shut down for the night.
Working in this place has broken me, I know it.
\n<Drone>Hello.\.\. This will hurt if you resist.\.\. Many thanks for your understanding.
\n<Elovia>This door seems unusable at the moment.
\n<Drone>Your motor systems may be disabled temporarily. This may cause some discomfort.
\n<Elovia>Even down here, there's still some semblance of life.
\n<Elovia>Even down here, there's still some semblance of life.
\n<Elovia>Even down here, there's still some semblance of life.
\n<Elovia>Even down here, there's still some semblance of life.
The following is an archived conversation transcript:
\n<Julie>Just eleven more hours and then we can take a break!
\n<Alex>You guys wanna hang with me? Check it out. Fast Skunk. “Lightning Instincts”. Total banger.
\n<Alex>Suit yourselves. You’ll be missing out on two of the best experiences of your life, man.
\n<Holly>I just know he’s the one that keeps on sneaking out. Him and his gang of newcomers. Who else would want to do that?
\n<Holly>Speaking of... let's keep on putting our backs into it.
